backend/main.mo: Motoko actor for a restaurant backend that manages reservations, newsletter subscribers, and reviews with CRUD operations, sorting, and validation logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the Google Site Verification meta tag has been added to frontend/index.html with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, key components, and notable changes across pages, components, and data files.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar variables).
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file with full SEO metadata including Google Site Verification, Open Graph, Twitter Card, canonical link, and geo/local SEO tags for the Coal & Curry restaurant.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers on most routes while disallowing /cart and /checkout, and pointing to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing 9 public routes for coalandcurry.com with priorities, change frequencies, and a last-modified date of 2026-03-01.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application entry point that sets up TanStack Router with 11 routes, wraps the app in QueryClientProvider and CartProvider, and renders a shared Layout with Navbar, Footer, and floating buttons.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotP: Chat UI panel component for the Agni chatbot that renders a message thread, quick-reply buttons, and a text input form using local state and getBotResponse utility.
frontend/src/components/chatbot/ChatbotW: Floating chatbot toggle button that shows or hides the ChatbotPanel, fixed to the bottom-right corner of the screen.
frontend/src/components/gallery/Lightbox: A fullscreen image lightbox modal component that supports keyboard navigation (Escape, arrow keys) and prev/next buttons to cycle through an image array.
frontend/src/components/home/CustomerRev: A carousel-style customer reviews section that fetches top reviews from the backend via a query hook, falling back to hardcoded reviews, with star ratings and prev/next navigation.
frontend/src/components/home/HeroSection: The main hero section for the homepage featuring a background image, restaurant branding, CTA buttons linking to the menu and reservation pages, and key stats.
frontend/src/components/home/InstagramFe: Displays a grid of six static Instagram-style food images linking to the restaurant's Instagram profile, with hover overlay effects.
frontend/src/components/home/OffersGalle: A promotional section showing three hardcoded limited-time offers (Lunch Combo, Family Feast, Weekend Grill Fest) over a background image, with a link to the full offers page.
frontend/src/components/home/SignatureDi: Displays a grid of four featured signature dishes sourced from menu data, with spice level indicators, veg/non-veg badges, and an add-to-cart button.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingR: A fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that links to the reservation page, showing a calendar icon and 'Reserve' label on larger screens.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingW: A fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-left corner with a pulsing animation that opens a WhatsApp chat link in a new tab.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the site footer with brand info, social links, quick navigation links, menu categories, contact details, and an embedded newsletter signup section.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navbar.ts: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, active-link highlighting, cart icon with item count badge, and a 'Book Table' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/layout/Newslette: Email newsletter subscription form that calls the useSubscribeNewsletter mutation and displays success, duplicate, or error feedback messages.
frontend/src/components/menu/DishCard.ts: Displays a single menu item card with image, veg/non-veg badge, signature tag, price, spice-level flames, and add/remove cart quantity controls.
frontend/src/components/menu/MenuTabs.ts: Sticky horizontal scrollable tab bar for filtering menu items by category, highlighting the active category with an ember-colored style.
frontend/src/components/offers/Countdown: Live countdown timer component that calculates and displays days, hours, minutes, and seconds remaining until a given target date, updating every second.
frontend/src/components/seo/SEOHead.tsx: Headless component that imperatively sets document title, meta tags (description, robots, Open Graph, Twitter Card), canonical link, and JSON-LD schema via useEffect.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals) with add, remove, update-quantity, and clear actions, persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/context/LanguageContext.tsx: Provides a React context for toggling between English and Tamil languages, exposing a translation function `t()` and `toggleLanguage` to switch locales.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: Manages shopping cart state with add, remove, update, and clear operations, persisting cart items to localStorage and exposing cart count and total.
frontend/src/data/menuData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and static data for menu items and categories, including details like price, spice level, veg status, and coal-fire tags.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, providing a React context and hook with login, logout, and identity state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching reviews, submitting reviews and reservations, subscribing to the newsletter, and retrieving all reservations via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines the global CSS for the Coal & Curry dark theme using OKLCH color tokens, Tailwind directives, and custom utility classes for coal, ember, gold, and saffron brand palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About page for Coal & Curry restaurant, showcasing the founder's story, team chef profiles, and core brand values with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Renders the Blog listing page with a featured post and a grid of additional articles covering Chettinad food stories, recipes, and Tamil culture, with SEO metadata.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Displays the shopping cart page, allowing users to view, adjust quantities, remove items, and proceed to checkout using the CartContext.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Implements a multi-step checkout flow (order type, details, payment, confirmation) with simulated payment processing and cart clearing on completion.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact page with business hours, contact details, social links, a WhatsApp link, and a simple contact form with submission state handling.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page displaying restaurant photos organized into four sections (Signature Dishes, Charcoal Kitchen, Ambience, Dosas) with a lightbox component for full-screen image navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page composing the hero section, features strip, signature dishes, customer reviews, and an about teaser with SEO metadata and JSON-LD restaurant schema.
frontend/src/pages/Loyalty.tsx: Loyalty program page showing four reward tiers (Coal to Inferno), program benefits, and a phone-number enrollment form with basic validation.
frontend/src/pages/Menu.tsx: Menu page with category tab filtering and text search over menuItems data, rendering results in a responsive DishCard grid with SEO head.
frontend/src/pages/Offers.tsx: Offers page listing six promotional deals (weekend discounts, combos, birthday specials, etc.) with countdown timers, badges, and a hero banner image.
frontend/src/pages/Reservation.tsx: Table reservation page with a validated form (name, phone, date, time, guests, occasion, seating) that submits via useSubmitReservation and shows a confirmation screen on success.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotResponses.ts: Defines quick-reply button labels and a keyword-to-response mapping for a restaurant chatbot, covering topics like menu, timings, reservations, delivery, specialties, and payment.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Coal & Curry frontend, extending the theme with custom font families, a branded color palette (coal, ember, gold, saffron, cream), box shadows, and accordion/WhatsApp-pulse keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for 'Coal & Curry' at schema version 1.0.0, recording one existing feature (Google Site Verification meta tag) and no pending new feature requests.
